sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_basic_type_t (basicTypeName,isexternal,externalid,istree,validflag,parentid,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$basicTypeName$',$isexternal$,$externalid$,$istree$,$validflag$,$parentid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_basic_type_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE sys_basic_type_t SET basicTypeName = '$basicTypeName$',isexternal=$isexternal$,externalid=$externalid$,istree=$istree$ ,parentid=$parentid$,memo='$memo$',addoperator='$addoperator$',addtime='$addtime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT b.*, CONCAT( b.id, '-', b.basicTypeName ) AS basicTypeName1 FROM sys_basic_type_t b WHERE b.validflag > 0 ORDER BY b.id
SELECT IFNULL(id,COUNT(id)) FROM sys_basic_type_t WHERE validflag > 0 and basicTypeName='$basicTypeName$'
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_type_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
